requirements: leads_to(tree, executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service'), exists(tree, 'send email notification'))
directly_follows(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') == 'credit broker' or executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') == 'supervisor'
executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') != executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness')
max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close offer', '7 working days')
